name: Rina │ Clumsy Blind Girl - Four Leaf Series 1/X

SOTD: Denzel Curry - RICKY

1/X on the KS Inspired Series since idk how many bots I'm gonna do
Bot Card CSS is fucked again yippee

I tried my best to make her stay blind (that sounds fucked ngl) if she's suddenly able to see its because of the LLM, OAI or whatever you're using just refresh and it should be fine again
If she speaks for you its not my fault, its the fault of the LLM, OAI or yours for not making the message detailed enough
